name: AeroMed Guardian AI - Pilot Medical Certificate Tracking
concept: AI-powered FAA medical certificate tracking and renewal platform for pilots and flight departments. Monitors medical expiration, predicts disqualifying conditions before AME exams, and automates the SI/SSPI waiver process.
target_market: Flight departments, charter operators, flight schools (5K departments)
business_model: B2B - $1,500/month (up to 10 pilots) or $4,000/month (unlimited), B2C - $29/month individual

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Commercial pilots lose $5K-15K/week when grounded, flight departments lose $50K+/week per pilot

ai_advantage: Predictive condition screening: AI analyzes pilot health data against FAA disqualifying conditions list
SI/SSPI waiver automation: LLMs generate waiver documentation from medical records
AME finder: NLP-based matching of pilots to medical examiners based on condition expertise
Expiry prediction: ML models predict medical deferral risk based on age, conditions, medications
competitive_advantage: Proprietary database of 3,000+ FAA AME specialization patterns
FAA medical form parsing expertise (MedXPress complexity)
Integration with FAA Pilot Records Database (PRD)
primary_risks: FAA regulatory approval required for PRD access
